_publications._publicationTitle: Selumetinib normalizes Ras/MAPK signaling in clinically relevant neurofibromatosis type 1 minipig tissues in vivo.

_contextSnippet: Mean plasma concentration–time profiles and PK parameters showed minimal variability between individuals and genotypes
details: Successfully calculated pharmacokinetic parameters including Cmax, Tmax, T1/2, and AUC for selumetinib in minipig plasma and tissues
